stdout:
Table	Create Table
userEmailSendLog	CREATE TABLE `userEmailSendLog` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `digestType` enum('monday','thursday','manager_rollup') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `sentDate` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `sentAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `status` enum('sent','failed','dry_run','pending') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sent',
  `error` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `weekKey` varchar(8) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `itemCount` int DEFAULT '0',
  `dryRun` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_user_type_date` (`userId`,`digestType`,`sentDate`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=1410001
